description: Arxis, Inc. designs and manufactures electronic and mechanical components for mission critical applications in the United States. The company operates through two segments: Electronic Components and Mechanical Components. Its Electronic Components segment provides engineered electronic components and interconnect solutions, including connectors, cable assemblies, microelectronic packaging, radio frequency (RF) and microwave products, power products, sensors, capacitors. and resistors.
